scripts.build: node scripts/sync-provenance.mjs full && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:public: node scripts/sync-provenance.mjs public && VITE_CONTENT_SCOPE=public-domain tsc && VITE_CONTENT_SCOPE=public-domain vite build && node scripts/sync-provenance.mjs full
scripts.audit:public: VITE_CONTENT_SCOPE=public-domain npm run build:public && node scripts/audit-public.mjs
